author: Patrick Stox
title: 8.64% of AI Overviews Appear Outside Position #1 (And as Low as Position #6)
content:
AI Overviews aren't always in the first position in the SERPs. For example, AI Overviews can appear in the 2nd position.

You can use the SERP features filter along with the Position filter in Ahrefs' Site Explorer to find AI Overviews outside of the top position. Head to the Organic keywords report and apply these filters.

Data analysis:
A data scientist pulled 10 million SERPs with AI Overviews total (1 million per country across 10 different countries in July 2025). The findings show that AI Overviews show outside of position 1 for 8.64% of queries. The lowest position observed was position 6.

Key findings:
- AI Overviews appeared in position 1 for 91.36% of SERPs
- AI Overviews appeared outside position 1 for 8.64% of queries
- The lowest position found was the 6th position

Country variations:
There were slight differences across countries, with Japan and Spain having more AI Overviews outside of position 1 compared to other countries studied.

Implications:
Right now there aren't a lot of AI Overviews showing outside the 1st position, but it does seem like Google is willing to rank some of them lower. This raises the question of whether Google has some kind of scoring system for how good the generated AI Overview result is.

The question remains whether Google will start ranking AI Overviews outside of position 1 more often, or if they will decide to go back to having all of them in position 1.
